name: Oshkosh Community
description_short: Oshkosh Community Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering competitive loan rates, savings accounts, and financial services to Wisconsin residents with NCUA insurance protection.
description_long:
Oshkosh Community Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving the Oshkosh, Wisconsin area. As a not-for-profit member-owned institution, it operates under NCUA insurance and has been providing financial services with emphasis on competitive rates and financial stability. The credit union's routing number is 275981145 and NMLS number is 410632.

OCCU offers a comprehensive range of consumer financial products including vehicle loans (as low as 3.48% APR), personal loans (as low as 8.95% APR), VISA Scorecard credit cards (as low as 9.49% APR), mortgages, and savings products. Members have access to direct deposit, payroll deduction options, check cards, savings debit cards, money orders, cashier's checks, and ATM services. The credit union also provides investment and insurance services through TruStage partnerships and student loan education lending options.

Oshkosh Community Credit Union distinguishes itself through multiple member convenience features including a 24-hour ATM in the drive-thru, night depository service, and a dedicated Union Gold program for members age 60 and over offering reduced fees and free services. The institution emphasizes accessibility with both phone support (920-233-1952) and a comprehensive online presence with current rate information and loan applications available through their website.

As a regional credit union, OCCU serves a specific geographic membership base in Wisconsin. While offering competitive rates on core products, the institution's scope is limited compared to larger national financial institutions. Member eligibility is restricted to those meeting the credit union's field of membership requirements, and service offerings are more focused on traditional consumer banking rather than comprehensive wealth management or business services.
services: Vehicle loans with rates as low as 3.48% APR
Personal loans with rates as low as 8.95% APR
VISA Scorecard credit cards with rates as low as 9.49% APR
Mortgage lending for home purchases and refinancing
Direct deposit for automated paycheck distribution
Payroll deduction for automatic savings and loan payments
Check cards (2-in-1 debit and credit functionality)
Savings debit cards for ATM-only access
Money orders and cashier's checks ($2.00 each)
Student loan education lending through ISL partnerships
pros: Vehicle loan rates as low as 3.48% APR, which is highly competitive for auto financing
24-hour ATM access located in drive-thru eliminates banking hours limitations
Night depository service for after-hours check deposits
Union Gold program for seniors (60+) includes 5 free money orders/cashier's checks per month and 1 free box of checks annually
Direct deposit and payroll deduction options for automated savings and loan payments
NCUA insurance protection on member deposits up to applicable limits
Dual-function check card combining debit and credit features for checking account access
cons: Limited geographic membership—only available to those within the credit union's field of membership in the Oshkosh area
Personal loan APR starting at 8.95% is higher than many online personal loan lenders offer
Credit card APR of 9.49% is relatively high compared to rewards-focused credit cards from major issuers
Website provides limited detail on savings account rates, certificate rates, or other deposit products
No mention of business lending services or commercial accounts for small business owners
best_for: Oshkosh-area residents seeking auto financing with competitive rates below market average
Wisconsin members age 60+ looking for reduced fees and senior-specific banking benefits
Local community members preferring member-owned, not-for-profit financial institutions over commercial banks
Individuals needing reliable basic banking services with 24-hour ATM and direct deposit convenience
diagnosis: Oshkosh Community Credit Union is best for Wisconsin residents within its membership field seeking competitive auto loan rates and convenient member-owned banking services with strong NCUA protections. The primary caveat is geographic restriction—membership eligibility is limited to specific communities in the Oshkosh area, making this institution unavailable for out-of-region consumers.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Oshkosh Community — Credit Union in OSHKOSH, WI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Oshkosh Community — NCUA-insured credit union in OSHKOSH, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
